name: Wand of Slaughter (9th-Rank Spell)
description:
This polished black wand has a green gem at the tip, and anyone who looks into it sees a reflection of a grinning skull.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast Execute at 9th-rank. If the spell slays a living target, the corpse releases grim energy in a 20-foot emanation, dealing 18 void damage.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of execute at 9th-rank.
